_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Lead and oversee budget, staffing, and contracting.
reference_document_element_description: Build and lead cross-functional transformation teams, establishing shared objectives, working norms, and accountability structures across organizational boundaries.
comments: DCWF task intersects with WIDAI LS domain. LS-T-003 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DG-T-003 (DG, cosine: 0.508), LS-S-007 (LS, cosine: 0.500).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 1.7/10 (raw 0.167). Shared vocabulary: [lead]. DCWF-only terms [budget, contracting, oversee, staffing] vs WIDAI-only terms [accountability, across, boundaries, build, cross, establishing] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.887 (P=0.915, R=0.861). P exceeds R by 0.054 — the DCWF element's 7 words are well-captured by the WIDAI KSA's 17 words, but the KSA contains additional specificity not reflected in the DCWF element.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (94.4%). "Lead and oversee budget, staffing, and contracting." and "Build and lead cross-functional transformation teams, establishing shared object" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.510 > STS 0.167 (gap +0.342). Independent encoding finds more similarity than cross-attention. Shared surface terms [lead] inflate the bi-encoder, but cross-attention detects semantic divergence beneath the vocabulary overlap.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 9.5%. Shared tokens: [lead]. DCWF-only: [budget, contracting, oversee, staffing]. WIDAI-only: [accountability, across, boundaries, build, cross, establishing].
